_doc: FROZEN GOLDEN — captured 2026-06-11 from the live ArchiveProposalKind class (pre-deletion), F3 lote-2. Deep-equaled against the descriptor-synthesized port in test_lote2_descriptor_equivalence.py. POST-CAPTURE EDIT (censo-12-kinds, 2026-07-20): identity.docs / identity.display_label / schema descriptions were re-synced from the descriptor after prose-only corrections (removed claims of producers/verifiers that do not ship in this distribution; disambiguated the three 'Insight' display labels). No Kind identity, field, type, requiredness, default or enum changed.

evidence.description: Plain-text justification. E.g. 'Unreferenced by any WorkflowEvent.methodology_artifact in 91 entries scanned. Last touch 73 days ago.'

reason.description: Why prune. orphan = no inbound refs; superseded = newer doc replaces; stale = no touch beyond threshold; contradicted = newer doc disagrees; duplicate = identical.

review_deadline.description: Spec §15: default proposed_at + 14d. Stale proposals past this date should be re-evaluated (not auto-vetoed).

status.description: proposed → approved → executed (moves target to _forgotten/) OR proposed → vetoed (target stays).

target_kind.description: Any Kind name (e.g. 'Plan', 'Story', 'Issue', 'Spec'). Self-references rejected at execution time.

target_name.description: Slug of the doc being proposed for forgetting.

out.evidence: Unreferenced in 91 WorkflowEvents scanned. Last touch 73 days ago.

spec.evidence: Unreferenced in 91 WorkflowEvents scanned. Last touch 73 days ago.
